summary: Backend end-to-end pytest suite (13 tests) passes 100% against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Covered root, profile CRUD, leads discovery/list/patch/csv-export, research generate/list, posts generate/list/patch/schedule/metrics/strategy, voice Q&A generate/answer/list, emails generate/list/patch/mark-sent/delete, dashboard summary, and cleanup. Gemini (gemini-3-flash-preview via emergentintegrations) responded within timeouts and produced valid JSON for all AI endpoints on this run.

minor.issue: Buffer branch is a no-op (only sets 'intent' detail); real Buffer API integration not implemented. Acceptable per spec but user should be aware.
Returns empty {} if Gemini returns non-dict; no schema guarantee (tests passed because Gemini returned expected keys).
Total request time can be 10-30s; no streaming/progress indicator. Not a bug but relevant for UX.
POST returns fields flat with 'ok' key while GET returns fields without 'ok'; inconsistent envelope.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 855 lines — consider splitting into routers/models/services modules for maintainability.
Gemini prompts are inline and long; extract to a prompts module for iteration and testing.
No pagination on list endpoints (only a `limit` param); consider offset/skip for large datasets.
generate_post silently swallows malformed AI JSON and stores the raw text in `body`; consider surfacing a warning flag to the client.
schedule_post uses payload.get('full_text') which is never populated by client contract in this codebase — Publer body will always be blank when scheduled via current UI contract.
No auth on any endpoint (single-tenant assumption). Fine for MVP but flag if multi-user is added.
Profile is a singleton via `_id: 'singleton'` — safe but note upsert without validation of numeric bounds (e.g., leads_per_cycle could be negative).
seed_data_creation: Created a TEST profile (name='TEST User', leads_per_cycle=3) plus transient leads/topics/posts/emails/voice-questions that were cleaned up in test_13. Some Gemini-generated leads/topics/voice_qa may persist in DB from mid-suite creation before deletion — only ids tracked in state were cleaned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py as regression suite. It relies on sequential ordering via a module-level `state` dict, so run without -p xdist parallelism at test-function level (LoadScope group already keeps them on one worker). Gemini calls take 3-8s each; total suite ~45s. Set leads_per_cycle small (3) in profile to keep discovery fast.
